_comment: Curated GitHub-hosted Agent Skills (open SKILL.md standard) vendored into canonical .agents/skills so they load in EVERY session of every agent (Claude, Codex, etc.), including ephemeral cloud containers that do NOT auto-install marketplace/GitHub skills. Only list skills NOT already available in your agent's cloud. After editing, run: .agents/scripts/sync-skills.sh  (a SessionStart hook also refreshes stale/broken copies). Do NOT add author-specific skills with hardcoded local paths; hand-author repo-aware skills directly in .agents/skills instead (those aren't in the lock, so sync won't clobber them).

sources.name: compound-knowledge
sources.note: kw:* knowledge-work workflow (brainstorm -> plan -> confidence -> review -> work -> compound) + its research/review subagents.

sources.name: matt-pocock
sources.note: Matt Pocock's KNOWLEDGE-WORK / WRITING / OBSIDIAN skills only. His engineering set is intentionally excluded — if needed it belongs in a separate code-focused vault. 'include' cherry-picks specific skill dirs across his personal/, in-progress/, and productivity/ folders.

sources.name: corey-haines-marketing
sources.note: Corey Haines' SaaS marketing skills (CRO, copywriting, content strategy, ads, cold email, etc.).
